title: Looking for Category Manager at StayVista

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at StayVista
jsonLd.description:
StayVista invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StayVista:
StayVista is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StayVista!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
